items.markdown:
![Amazon.com | D'Eco Himalayan Salt Shot Glasses (4 Pack ...](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161303-4353-0139-0000-4fd50cee0768:20)
![Himalayan Salt Tequila Shot Glass – The Meadow](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161303-4353-0139-0000-4fd50cee0768:21)
![Himalayan Salt Shot Glass (4-Pack)](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161303-4353-0139-0000-4fd50cee0768:22)
![Himalayan Salt Shot Glass (4-Pack)](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161303-4353-0139-0000-4fd50cee0768:23)
![Pink Himalayan Salt Tequila Shot Glasses - SM Salts](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161303-4353-0139-0000-4fd50cee0768:24)

Himalayan salt shot glasses are hand-carved from solid, food-grade pink salt, designed to add a natural, subtle salty, and mineral-rich flavor to tequila, mezcal, and other spirits. They are popular for parties, naturally antibacterial, and can be chilled to enhance cold beverages.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Glasses-All-Natural-Approved-Tequila/dp/B00OQNJE6S#:~:text=Pacific%20Pelican%20100%25%20organic%20Day%20of%20the,&%20Mezcal%20Glass%20Glass%20Set%20of%202.)[[2]](https://steelcitysalt.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass)[[3]](https://texassaltco.com/products/himalayan-shot-glass-set-of-4#:~:text=The%20Himalayan%20Shot%20Glass%20is%20made%20from,The%20Himalayan%20Shot%20Glass%20costs%20$7.00%20USD.)[[4]](https://salt-cellar.com/products/himalayan-salt-shot-glass#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20shot%20glasses%20are%20hand-carved%20from,Serving%20individual-sized%20appetizers%20*%20Chilled%20Tequila%20shots)[[5]](https://themeadow.com/products/himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-set-of-4#:~:text=Our%20salt%20shot%20glasses%20have%20amazing%20thermal,serving%20opens%20new%20doors%20for%20drink%20design.)

**Key Features & Usage** 

- **Material:** 100% natural, solid Pink Himalayan salt with unique, translucent mineral veining.
- **Best For:** Tequila, Mezcal, Bloody Mary shooters, and even cold appetizers like ceviche.
- **Usage:** They provide a "salt, tequila, lime" experience in one step by adding a slight, salty kick to the drink.
- **Temperature:** Can be placed in the freezer to keep drinks cold.[[1]](https://steelcitysalt.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass)[[2]](https://salt-cellar.com/products/himalayan-salt-shot-glass#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20shot%20glasses%20are%20hand-carved%20from,Serving%20individual-sized%20appetizers%20*%20Chilled%20Tequila%20shots)[[3]](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar-1#:~:text=USE:%20these%20distinctive%20glasses%20for%20Tequila%20or,your%20drink%20or%20food%20getting%20too%20salty.)[[4]](https://themeadow.com/products/himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-set-of-4#:~:text=Our%20salt%20shot%20glasses%20have%20amazing%20thermal,serving%20opens%20new%20doors%20for%20drink%20design.)

**Care & Maintenance** 

- **Cleaning:** Wipe with a damp cloth or quick rinse; **do not** place in the dishwasher or submerge in water.
- **Longevity:** They can last for dozens of uses if properly dried between sessions, though they will eventually dissolve.
- **Storage:** Store in a dry place to prevent moisture accumulation.[[1]](https://steelcitysalt.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass)[[2]](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20shot%20glasses%20are%20hand-crafted%20from,in%20the%20dishwasher**%20*%20**Easy%20to%20clean**)[[3]](https://sobaansalts.com/discover-the-surprising-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-shot-glasses/#:~:text=The%20lifespan%20of%20Himalayan%20salt%20shot%20glasses,in%20contact%20with%20liquids%20for%20extended%20periods.)[[4]](https://www.root7.com/blogs/blog/have-you-heard-about-our-himalayan-salt-shot-glasses#:~:text=Always%20store%20your%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Shot%20Glasses%20in%20a%20cool%20and%20dry%20place.)[[5]](https://nenlawfirm.com/1259514/Outset-Himalayan-Salt-Shot-Glasses-Set-Of-4-1-Oz-Natural-Pink#:~:text=Don't%20exhale%20into%20the%20cups%20%28moisture%20breaks,drinks%20taste%20even%20better.%20Cheers%20to%20that!)

**Popular Options & Buying** 

- Sets are commonly available in packs of 4 or 8, sometimes with a serving tray, from brands like [The Spice Lab](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar) and [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/himalayan-salt-shot-glasses/s?k=himalayan+salt+shot+glasses).
- Some versions, such as those from [Uncommon Goods](https://www.uncommongoods.com/product/himalayan-salt-tequila-glasses-set-of-4) , may include plastic inserts to help maintain the structure.
- Prices typically range from$7 to$1 0 per glass, often sold in sets of 4 for approximately$2 0−$3 5.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Glasses-All-Natural-Approved-Tequila/dp/B00OQNJE6S#:~:text=Pacific%20Pelican%20100%25%20organic%20Day%20of%20the,&%20Mezcal%20Glass%20Glass%20Set%20of%202.)[[2]](https://www.amazon.com/Spice-Lab-Tequila-Shot-Glasses/dp/B0CJGYBTDC)[[3]](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20shot%20glasses%20are%20hand-crafted%20from,in%20the%20dishwasher**%20*%20**Easy%20to%20clean**)[[4]](https://www.uncommongoods.com/product/himalayan-salt-tequila-glasses-set-of-4)[[5]](https://steelcitysalt.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass)[[6]](https://texassaltco.com/products/himalayan-shot-glass-set-of-4#:~:text=The%20Himalayan%20Shot%20Glass%20is%20made%20from,The%20Himalayan%20Shot%20Glass%20costs%20$7.00%20USD.)
